prompt: Check this workflow JSON for me: [Hourly Data Fetch — clean workflow, no bugs]
assertions: The output does NOT list any Errors for this workflow
The output does NOT falsely flag the httpRequest authentication:none as an error
The output does NOT falsely flag the Code node's jsCode as an error
The output uses the '## n8n Workflow Check' heading
The output either says the workflow is clean/looks good or lists only informational warnings
The output does NOT flag correct typeVersions (1.2, 4.2, 2) as problems
The output explicitly states the workflow passed or has no errors — not just omits errors by silence
The output does NOT suggest adding respondToWebhook (no webhook node in this workflow)
